name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Gamma 1
description: Manufacturer:BandaiCode:BTN64033-8Height:14cmCHOKING HAZARD:This product may contain small parts. It is not a toy and only suitable for the persons over 15 years old.  Attention:No guarantee on mint box.Other figures not included.Description:Set Contents:Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Four optional heads, Gun, Crossed arm partsBonus Parts:Super Saiyan Son Gohan Head, Super Saiyan Son Gohan expression parts x2Gamma 1, from "Dragon Ball Super: SUPER HERO," joins S.H.Figuarts! Numerous optional expressions and accessories let you re-create dramatic scenes. Two guns are included: a holstered version and a drawn version he can hold in his hand. The set also includes an optional head and two expressions for the S.H.Figuarts Ultimate Gohan SUPER HERO figure (sold separately.) Combine these with the bonus parts included with the S.H.Figuarts Gamma 2 (sold separately) to re-create your favorite scenes from the film!
